toast.source: 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Saturday, June 27' Daily Performance Summary (HTML-only; numbers parsed from HTML body). Freshest Toast at the Sun Jun 28 4 AM run.
toast.note: Sat Jun 27 detailed daily summary (HTML-only, parsed): Net $9,160.20, Gross $9,638.05. SDLW (Sat Jun 20) Net $8,007.80 (+14.4%), Gross $8,391.15 (+14.9%); 4-wk avg Net $9,065.70 (+1.0%), Gross $9,450.45 (+2.0%). Guests 333 / Orders 226 derived from avg net/guest $27.51 and avg net/order $40.53 (both divide cleanly; consistent with prior days). Labor ~$1,862.49 = 20.3% of net (SDLW $2,207.28, -15.6%). Discounts $477.85 = 5.0% of gross (SDLW $383.35). Voids ~$50 (approx, HTML parse). Refunds $0. Daypart: Dinner $6,129.25 (66.9%), Lunch $2,756.95 (30.0%), Espresso $265 (2.8%), Late Night $9. Category: Food $4,518.20 (49.3%), Draft Beer $1,737.50 (18.9%), Liquor $1,582 (17.2%), Wine $670 (7.3%). Strong Saturday.
